title: Xtremeauto Bungee Cords With Hooks 𝐉𝐮𝐦𝐛𝐨 𝐏𝐚𝐜𝐤 Of 12 Heavy Duty [𝐌𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐲 𝐆𝐫𝐚𝐝𝐞] Bungee Cord, UV Resistant Double Braided Elastic Bungee Straps For Securing Tarps Luggage Tents
features: Solid Elastic Cord Bungee Strap - Made from high quality rubber and 8mm thick, our 12 pack of bungee cords with hooks are strong and durable. Featuring a double woven elasicated rope braid.
12 Pack Of Long Bungie Cords - The Xtremeauto bungees are multi sized, our 12 pack includes 3 different bungee sizes (30cm, 60cm and 90cm). These can be clipped onto one another to extend the cable.
Perfect Gift For Hikers, Cyclists & Adventurists - Making a perfect gift for any DIYer or campers. A must have survival essential for all outdoor pursuits. A bungee rope size for every need!
Bright And Vibrant Bungee Straps With Hooks - Featuring 6 different colours, our long bungee cords with hooks are easy to see in darker situations, preventing trips and other accidents.

Extra Strong Military Grade Bungees With Hooks - With a 35kg breaking strength, our chords are made to withstand. Commonly used for fixing tents & tarp in place but can also be used to hold luggage in place.
description: Product Description Xtremeauto Bungee Cords With Hooks - Extra heavy duty double braided cording. A quick and easy solution for securing luggage or tarps in place. UV Resistant and weatherproof pack of 12 elastic strap with hooks. These super stretchy bunjee cords stretch to double the length of themselves, manufactured from high quality durable materials and an anti scratch rubber tip on the hooks so you do not scrape your items when hooking on. Superior Design - Made From High Quality Stretchy Elastic Featuring a large unique 12 pack size with 3 different sizes of cord, choose the desired length you need for the job. Small bungee cords and large bungee cords alike for securing and fastening all objects. Use in the car, your van or at home!
